description:
All tone parse functions (parse_pcms_common, parse_pcmd_common, parse_sns_common,
parse_sna_common, parse_snd_common) return struct defaults when data is too short
or malformed. Callers cannot distinguish "missing data" from "actual zero value."

Affected files:
- crates/integral-core/src/pcm_synth.rs, pcm_drum.rs, sn_synth.rs, sn_acoustic.rs, sn_drum.rs

Fix: Return Result<T, ParseError> instead of bare T. Update WASM bindings
(lib.rs lines 1332-1634) to propagate errors as JsError instead of
unwrap_or(JsValue::NULL).
title: Propagate errors from tone parse functions instead of silent defaults
